title: CashMintStandard
description: CashMintStandard v1.0 — Per-token NFT metadata schema for the Bitcoin Cash CashTokens ecosystem. A BCMR extension profile defining per-token metadata, royalty conventions, collection rules, and an optional AI agent hook.

$schema.description: Must be the canonical CashMintStandard schema URI. Identifies this file as a CMS-compliant token.

cms_version.description: Semantic version of the CashMintStandard spec this token was minted against. Must be '1.0'.

name.description: Human-readable name of this specific token. Should include the collection name and token identifier. Max 64 characters recommended for wallet display.

description.description: Human-readable description of this specific token. First 140 characters shown in compact views. Full text shown in detail views.
examples: A legendary fire tiger from the Mystic Tigers collection.

image.description: URI pointing to the token's primary image. MUST be an IPFS URI for immutability. HTTPS fallback allowed only for mutable tokens. Square aspect ratio recommended (400x400px minimum).

animation_url.description: URI pointing to an animated or interactive version of the asset. Supported formats: mp4, webm, gif, glb, html. IPFS preferred.

external_url.description: URL to the project's page for this specific token. Rendered as a clickable link in wallets and marketplaces.

attributes.description: Array of trait objects defining the characteristics of this token. Absent if the token has no traits. MUST NOT be an empty array — omit entirely if unused.

value.description: The value of this trait. String for categorical traits. Number for numeric or date traits.

display_type.description: How wallets and marketplaces should render this trait's value. Omit for standard string traits.

media.description: Additional media files associated with this token. Absent if no supplementary files. MUST NOT be an empty array.

uri.description: URI of the media file. IPFS preferred.

type.description: MIME type of the media file.

cdn.description: Whether this URI is served from a CDN for faster access. A CDN copy does not replace the IPFS canonical source.

royalty.description: Royalty convention for secondary sales. Not protocol-enforced — marketplaces adopting CashMintStandard are expected to honor this. Absent if no royalty is requested.

bps.description: Royalty amount in basis points. 100 bps = 1%. Max 1000 (10%).

address.description: Primary Bitcoin Cash address to receive royalty payments. cashaddr format required.

splits.description: Optional split of royalty among multiple recipients. Shares must sum to 100. If absent, full royalty goes to address.

share.description: Percentage share of the total royalty amount. All shares must sum to 100.

creators.description: Verified creator attribution. Each entry is a BCH address with a percentage share of credit. Shares should sum to 100. Absent if no explicit attribution needed.

name.description: Optional display name for this creator.

uri.description: Optional URI to the creator's profile or website.

collection.description: Information about the collection this token belongs to. Absent for one-of-one tokens with no collection context.

category_id.description: The CashTokens category ID (32-byte txid hex) of this collection. Links the off-chain metadata to the on-chain token family.

max_supply.description: Maximum number of tokens that can ever exist in this collection. Absent means unlimited or unknown.

token_serial.description: This token's sequential number within the collection. Zero-indexed.

extensions.description: Optional extension namespace. Absent for tokens that use no extensions. Third parties may add their own keys alongside 'ai_hook'. Unknown keys MUST be ignored by validators.

ai_hook.description: AI agent hook specification. Defines the relationship between this NFT and an AI agent. Optional. Wallets that do not implement ai_hook MUST ignore this block entirely.

type.description: Declares the NFT's relationship to the AI agent. 'gateway' = NFT grants access to an agent. 'identity' = NFT IS the agent's on-chain identity.

endpoint.description: Where to reach the AI agent. Required for gateway and identity types.

protocol.description: Communication protocol. 'https' for standard REST. 'mcp' for Model Context Protocol. 'a2a' for Agent-to-Agent protocol.

auth.description: Authentication method the agent uses to verify the caller. 'bearer_ownership' = prove UTXO ownership via signed challenge. 'none' = open access. 'api_key' = static key. 'signed_challenge' = custom challenge-response.

network.description: Which BCH network this endpoint is active on.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent exposes. Wallets use this to render relevant UI affordances.

model.description: Describes the underlying AI model powering this agent. Informational only.

identity.description: Agent identity declaration. Required when type is 'identity'. The NFT represents this agent's on-chain anchor.

did.description: Decentralized Identifier for this agent. Format: did:bch:{category_id}:{token_serial}. Follows W3C DID spec pattern, BCH-native.

public_key.description: Agent's compressed public key (33 bytes, hex). Used to verify messages signed by this agent. Owner of the UTXO can rotate this key by updating the mutable token's commitment.

reputation_uri.description: Optional URI pointing to a verifiable reputation record for this agent.

ownership_gate.description: Specifies how the agent verifies that the caller owns this NFT's UTXO. Required when endpoint.auth is 'bearer_ownership' or 'signed_challenge'.

method.description: Verification method. 'utxo_proof' = caller signs a server-issued nonce with the private key controlling this token's UTXO. Agent verifies the signature matches the UTXO locking script. No oracle required.

challenge_endpoint.description: URL where the caller requests a nonce to sign. Agent issues a random nonce, caller signs with UTXO key, agent verifies.

category_id.description: The CashTokens category ID used to locate the UTXO for ownership verification.

token_serial.description: The specific token serial number within the category. Used with category_id to uniquely identify the UTXO.

update_policy.description: For tokens with CashTokens 'mutable' capability. Declares which ai_hook fields can be updated by the UTXO holder, and which are permanently fixed.

mutable_fields.description: JSON paths of ai_hook fields that the UTXO owner may update.

immutable_fields.description: JSON paths of ai_hook fields that are permanently fixed at mint time.

update_auth.description: Who may perform updates. 'utxo_owner' = only the current holder of the mutable token UTXO.

examples.name: Mountain Sunset
examples.description: A digital painting of a mountain at dusk.

examples.name: Mystic Tiger #042
examples.description: A legendary fire tiger from the Mystic Tigers collection.
